spaces.title: Jay-Z's Bronx Farewell

seedDailyQuestion.text: Were you in the crowd (or locked outside) for Jay-Z's last Yankee Stadium night? What's the one moment you'll never forget?

spaces.whyNow: Jay-Z closed his Yankee Stadium residency last night with Beyoncé, Rihanna and Usher after a chaotic lockdown stranded fans outside.

spaces.title: Erewhon's $12 Sacred Water

seedDailyQuestion.text: $12 'Sacred Water' — genius or crime? What's the most LA thing you've ever paid too much for?

spaces.whyNow: The internet is roasting Erewhon's new $12 'Sacred Water' as a 'crime' during LA's hottest stretch of the summer.

spaces.title: Mulaney Makes Wrigley History

seedDailyQuestion.text: Mulaney just became the first comic to headline Wrigley — who's the one comedian you'd fill a stadium to see?

spaces.whyNow: John Mulaney made Wrigley Field history Saturday night as the first comic to headline the ballpark, a hometown milestone.

spaces.title: Singin' at Zilker Hillside

seedDailyQuestion.text: Blanket on the Zilker hillside for a free summer musical — what's your ideal Austin date under the stars?

spaces.whyNow: Austin's free Zilker Summer Musical returned this week with 'Singin' in the Rain' on the Hillside Theater.

spaces.title: 40-Ft Trojan Horse on the UWS

location.name: Upper West Side, New York, NY

seedDailyQuestion.text: A giant Trojan Horse just showed up outside your local theater — what's the most absurd NYC street sight you've stumbled onto?

spaces.whyNow: A 40-foot Trojan Horse statue was just erected in front of an Upper West Side movie theater, drawing crowds and confusion.

spaces.title: Ohtani at Dodger Stadium

seedDailyQuestion.text: Ohtani ball at the game or the Ohtani section of the store — where do you drop your money first?

spaces.whyNow: Shohei Ohtani mania has 10x'd sales in one area of Dodger Stadium as the Dodgers roll through their summer homestand.

spaces.title: Chicago's Concrete Beach

seedDailyQuestion.text: The world is roasting our concrete 'beach' — where's your real go-to spot to soak up a Chicago summer day?

spaces.whyNow: A photo of Chicagoans sunbathing on the concrete lakefront went viral, triggering the internet during this week's heat wave.

spaces.title: Kurt Vile at ACL Live

seedDailyQuestion.text: Kurt Vile at the Moody tonight — what's the song you always want the encore to be?

spaces.whyNow: Kurt Vile and The Violators play ACL Live at the Moody Theater tonight, kicking off a hot week of Austin shows.
